title: Tech giant Palantir exits Denver, moves headquarters to Miami
summary: Tech giant Palantir Technologies Inc. announced Tuesday it has relocated its headquarters from Denver, Colorado, to Miami, Florida.
author: Scripps News Group

title: Teaching AI to read a map
Real-world medical questions stump AI chatbots
summary: Subtle shifts in how users described symptoms to AI chatbots led to dramatically different, sometimes dangerous medical advice.
author: Tina Hesman Saey

title: How to Automate Data Validation and Find the Best Tools for Monitoring Research Integrity
summary:

title: NTT DATA and Saal.ai Announce Strategic Collaboration
summary:
